channel.title: Daily Summaries on TzJ's Net
channel.description: Recent content in Daily Summaries on TzJ's Net

item.title: Bug Journal 2026-04-07
item.description: Fixed 4 script bugs in website/update.sh and set up a complete Hugo deployment environment, recovering the website update pipeline from total failure to all 7 steps passing; also initiated a full daily/weekly report MCP sync workflow

item.title: Bug Journal 2026-04-06
item.description: Completed planning and execution of three editorial annotation tasks for the MIHD paper draft, including rewriting Intro P1, expanding Abstract and R5/R6, while running three new cross-section query experiments and fixing HD Niche Query visualization

item.title: Bug Journal 2026-04-05
item.description: Completed architectural refactor of Linux FloatBall to fixed-window + GDK Input Shape to eliminate platform-level geometry offsets, and systematically resolved two root-cause issues in Life-Copilot Discord Bot: missing structured logging and MCP tool permission denial

item.title: Bug Journal 2026-04-04
item.description: Deep debugging and fixing multiple system-level bugs in TokenMonitor FloatBall on Linux (GTK size negotiation root cause, WM clamp positioning offset, etc.), completing a systematic research survey of 63 NeurIPS 2025 D&B Track papers, major Life-Copilot feature launches (Discord Bot architecture refactor with net -2823 lines, full Screen Time Tracker implementation, Feishu Bot for quick idea capture, Codex/Anthropic backend integration), and exploring AionUI remote SSH access feasibility.

item.title: Bug Journal 2026-04-03
item.description: MIHD project completed HD fusion experiment reruns, paper narrative restructuring, and bilingual skeleton writing, establishing the differentiated research positioning of zero-shot FM embedding fusion; TokenMonitor fixed float ball Rust compilation errors and continued Linux GTK window positioning bug fixes; Gadget completed two rounds of rclone bidirectional sync and investigated NIPS research data location

item.title: Bug Journal 2026-04-02
item.description: Dual-device parallel progress: DCC completed MIHD paper experiment scaffolding (GPU Slurm scripts + three visualization scripts); DesktopLinux fixed TokenMonitor platform bugs on Linux/Wayland, resolved all 21 code review issues from PR #4 and pushed to GitHub, and completed gadget environment initialization and Claude Code development toolchain setup on the new machine.

item.title: 错误日志 2026-04-01
item.description: DCC端完成了Leiden全量对比实验（核心结论：高质量的嵌入方式优于聚类方法的选择），并创建了HD niche query可视化界面；DesktopLinux端则负责新Linux工作站的初始化设置，以及TokenMonitor Tauri的构建工作。此外，通过两轮迭代修复，解决了悬浮球在Linux上的位置变化问题，以及收起残影时的跨平台兼容性问题。

item.title: Bug Journal 2026-03-31
item.description: Completed this week’s work plan for the MIHD paper, integrated Leiden clustering and STHD Ground Truth, successfully ran DLPFC Leiden baseline and HD full-pipeline evaluation, obtaining key experimental data

item.title: Bug Journal 2026-03-30
item.description: Completed TEDDY-G 400M gene foundation model embedding extraction across all 11 DLPFC slices with multi-strategy fusion benchmarking, and wrote the W13 weekly report summarizing last week’s experimental findings.

item.title: Bug Journal 2026-03-29
item.description: Analyzed the TEDDY single-cell foundation model paper on an HPC cluster, fixed 4 critical bugs in the existing extraction script, and successfully deployed embedding extraction for the DLPFC dataset.

item.title: 错误日志 2026-03-28
item.description: The entire process was carried out concurrently on two devices, tianhe and TzJsDesktop, across four projects. On tianhe, the implementation of Context Replay concept refactoring and code fixes for error_recovery_benchmark was completed. Additionally, issues related to missing assets in the LIBERO/BOSS evaluation environment, as well as zero-shot design analysis, were resolved. On TzJsDesktop, the integration of the intelligent dual-track instrumentation architecture for cchypothesis skill was completed. Moreover, four progressive bug fixes were carried out for TokenMonitor applications, including dashboard jitter issues, Rust compilation errors, front-end import failures, and window anchoring problems.

item.title: 错误日志 2026-03-27
item.description: 我们统一了机器人评估脚本的日志和结果保存逻辑，并完全实现了cchypothesis假设驱动调试功能。同时，通过五轮迭代，我们彻底解决了TokenMonitor窗口底部出现抖动的问题。

item.title: 错误日志 2026-03-26
item.description: The process is carried out concurrently across three devices: DCC HPC, Tianhe Supercomputer, and TzJsDesktop. On DCC, the MIHD-QueST cross-sample query protocol has been finalized, along with the construction of a benchmark framework for 8 gene encoders. At Tianhe, the full task rollout evaluation of Pi0.5 LoRA has been completed, along with the migration to the BOSS environment and a systematic reconstruction of the Error Recovery Benchmark. TzJsDesktop has undergone multiple system upgrades to improve ccplan skills (Prompt Calibration, multi-intention decomposition, Feature Guard), and TokenMonitor has undergone significant feature improvements (full lifecycle of floating balls, Windows native UX, code refactoring, integration with ccusage).

item.title: 错误日志 2026-03-25
item.description: Tianhe server has successfully completed the construction of the entire VLA/robotics research technology stack for multiple users (Git migration, training scripts, data pipeline repairs, OpenPI evaluation client). TzJsDesktop has carried out modular refactoring of research_scout.py, adapted TokenMonitor for cross-platform use, built the first Windows .exe version, extended optimize skill across four languages, and carefully configured the Claude Code toolchain.

item.title: bug journal 2026-03-24
item.description: TzJsDesktop完成了gadget summarize模块的重构工作（将2930行代码整合到8个模块以及72个测试中），同时实现了summarize skill功能的升级，使其更加符合论文中的六章结构描述。此外，ccplan工具链也得到了全面修复。另外，TokenMonitor的架构规划也已完成，它从原本仅适用于macOS的平台扩展到了跨平台环境，并且已经启动了Phase A/E阶段的实现工作。tianhe则负责创建BOSS基准代码库CLAUDE.md文件，并解决了LiPM训练器中的5个bug问题。不过，由于API连接出现故障，他们的工作在上午中断了大约6小时。

item.title: Bug Journal 2026-03-23
item.description: Completed environment initialization on the DCC HPC cluster (rclone sync, GPU node survey, skill installation), and documented current issues for the MIHD research project.

item.title: 缺陷日志 2026-03-22
item.description: 天和集群已成功修复了错误恢复基准测试中的三项核心问题（爪子极性反转、wrong_object过滤逻辑错误、drop_with_interaction注入策略）。训练场景的数量也从1209增加到1627（+35%），同时深入分析了three_piece_assembly相位检测退化的根本原因，以及48个ungenerable cases的物理约束因素。此外，TzJsDesktop系统还完成了批量归档W05-W12历史周报的工作，修复了gadget网站部署过程中的问题，并完成了Hugo站点的导航下拉菜单的改造，同时统一构建了staging环境的架构。

item.title: 错误日志 2026-03-21
item.description: 在天津HPC集群中，已经完成了error_recovery_benchmark函数的全链路修复工作：从参数调优到架构级轨迹分段重构，共涉及1222个训练场景。同时，在TzJsDesktop中修复了gadget基础设施的关键漏洞，并将ECC工具链升级至opus+maxthinking版本。

item.title: 错误日志 2026-03-20
item.description: 在DCC和tianhe这两台HPC设备上，我们同步推进了四条主要任务：首先，修复error recovery benchmark中的drop_in_transit假阳性问题；其次，通过32个worker并行处理，生成了6个任务的973个训练场景（耗时41分钟）；第三，构建Pi0.5-base LoRA六任务合并数据集的微调流水线（数据转换和normalization已完成，训练因Slurm job到期而中断）；第四，修复STAIG超参数扫描的不公平问题，并建立了PCA+UNI/UNI2基准测试（AUC 0.47）；最后，开发了10x Visium空间转录组数据的scanpy分析脚本。

item.title: 错误日志 2026-03-19
item.description: Today’s AI Conversation Summary

item.title: 错误日志 2026-03-18
item.description: Cross-DCC, Tianhe, and local devices are working together to advance four research lines simultaneously. In DCC, we have completed the end-to-end implementation of MIHD cross-slice Embedding alignment and batch effect evaluation systems. In Tianhe, we have successfully launched the training of π₀.₅ task detection heads, fixed the issue with missing manip_progress records in the VLA evaluation pipeline, and completed the repairs for the LIBERO environment along with the design of experiments from Exp5 to Exp9. Locally, we have implemented batch task status updates for CalendarPro, thereby addressing the core defects in high-frequency daily interactions.

item.title: 错误日志 2026-03-17
item.description: 在DCC端，我们对MIHD多模态空间转录组项目进行了代码重构，解决了9个相关问题，并更新了相关文档。在tianhe端，多位研究员同时完成了robobrain_pi任务状态机的修复工作，以及训练损失值的分离监控、LIBERO测试套件的集成验证、error recovery benchmark 2920场景数据的质量检查、CALVIN格式转换脚本的修复、GPU监控工具的去重处理以及键盘导航功能的新增。此外，还确认了RoboCasa MimicGen预训练数据下载的上游原因。

item.title: 错误日志 2026-03-16
item.description: Parallel processing is carried out across three devices: DCC, tianhe, and TzJsDesktop. On DCC, spatial transcriptomics analysis across slides has been completed using the scGPT algorithm with a 100% accuracy rate. Additionally, dual-language documentation has been generated. On tianhe, the design of a collection scheme for 329 VLA errors has been finalized, along with the implementation of the entire pipeline. The bug related to CompositeBodyObject objects has been fixed, and batch error scene generation has been initiated. On TzJsDesktop, academic profiles of over 20 researchers have been processed in batches. Two rounds of code refactoring have been performed on Research Profiler, resulting in a systematic fix for S2 disambiguation errors. Moreover, the h-index of renowned professors has been accurately identified.

item.title: バグレポート 2026-03-15
item.description: Throughout the day, six main tasks will be carried out across three devices simultaneously: identifying the root causes of the dual incompatibility between DCC diagnosis and MIHD cross-sample embedding; Tianhe will complete the repair of five failed skills in ErrorRecoveryBenchmark v5, E2 semantic splitting (13 skills/29 subtypes), v4 archiving, D0 scenario generation, and planning for v5.1. At the same time, efforts will be made to fix all aspects of the VLA progress prediction training pipeline and debug the compatibility of UniVLA containers. TzJsDesktop will complete seven stages of comprehensive optimization for CalendarPro (230 tests passed), unify the restructuring of common gadgets/outputs, improve student discovery on the research profiler homepage and Hugo deployment, as well as integrate the research toolchain with the CLI (reference diagram + support for three backend LLMs).

item.title: 缺陷记录表 2026-03-14
item.description: We have improved the interactive experience of the GPU monitoring tool. We have also completed the visualization of 50 robot demonstration datasets using four cameras. Additionally, we have designed and implemented an experimental framework for predicting operational progress in four scenarios within the pi05 VLA model.

item.title: 缺陷记录表 2026-03-13
item.description: 为RoboTwin Place Dual Shoes机器人任务添加了五个新的每帧数据变量，并且修复了两个与数据收集相关的错误。

item.title: 错误日志 2026-03-12
item.description: 正在天河服务器的上调试VLA机器人评估环境中的多层依赖问题，同时优化GPU监控工具的显示逻辑。

item.title: 错误日志 2026-03-11
item.description: 在DCC完成了MIHD输出目录的大规模重构工作，以及151673↔151508区间的RM-IDEAL基准测试；同时在tianhe平台上开发了K8s容器内GPU监控工具，并对pi05 VLA训练模块的性能瓶颈进行了系统诊断与修复。该模块的性能比openpi慢了33%，我们已调整了与之相关的6个关键依赖项的版本（包括JAX等）。

item.title: bug journal 2026-03-10
item.description: Today’s AI Dialogue Summary

item.title: 错误日志 2026-03-09
item.description: The process is being carried out concurrently on three devices: DCC, tianhe, and TzJsDesktop. The MIHD cross-modal enhancement module is being utilized for cross-sample evaluation with RM-IDEAL. Robot error recovery benchmarks are being generated using quota-based data generation methods (these approaches expose limitations in online architectures and provide a new direction for offline injection). Additionally, the VLA robot framework is being engineered (using UniVLA/Pi0/RoboTwin data pipelines). Finally, the gadget tool is being upgraded to an AI Agent-accessible MCP service, and it has been integrated with CalendarPro.

item.title: 错误日志 2026-03-08
item.description: On the Tianhe server, extensive refactoring of the error_recovery_benchmark was completed, including the cleanup of all 65 symlinks and the migration of code paths. Multitask error scenarios were also addressed through MP4 visualization and development of pre-error playback storage layers. Additionally, the implementation of the VLA-RoboTwin key area annotation system was progressed, along with fixes to Vulkan rendering issues. Various features were also added locally, such as author search functionality for the gadget research_scout.

item.title: 错误日志 2026-03-07
item.description: In just one day, we successfully completed the entire construction process of the Gadget Research Scout paper management system. We were able to identify three potential research directions for the first time. Additionally, we advanced the development of the CalendarPro intention classification system by conducting root cause analysis and designing cross-project architectural specifications (by introducing the OpenClaw context window management model). We also managed to process the backlog of daily reports that had been pending for three days.

item.title: 错误日志 2026-03-06
item.description: 三台设备同日进行并行推进：DCC完成了ContraVAE与STHD空间转录组数据归一化处理的工作，同时tianhe修复了RoboTwin评估流程中的三个连续问题（Vulkan渲染、数据类冻结、路径重复），并完成了Phoenix/FLARE全任务训练脚本套件的开发。TzJsDesktop编写了关于CalendarPro的1674行中文使用教程，并找到了Discord bot在跨消息上下文丢失方面的三大根本原因。

item.title: バグレポート 2026-03-05
item.description: Over the entire day, three devices—DCC/tianhe/TzJsDesktop—were utilized to simultaneously carry out four projects: DCC completed the MIHD multimodal dataset benchmark and established a zero-shot narrative framework; tianhe deployed the zhaoganlong framework with a nine-task training pipeline, initiating two parallel training processes. Additionally, issues related to Openpi-moe normalization were resolved, and the separation of the Phoenix/FLARE code base was finalized. On TzJsDesktop, CalendarPro was fully upgraded to become an intelligent personal assistant capable of autonomous perception and multi-agent orchestration (with 321 successful tests).

item.title: 错误日志 2026-03-04
item.description: DCC 对 QueST 空间转录组学论文中的跨样本查询与评估方法进行了深入分析；tianhe 完成了多项项目文档的更新工作（包括错误恢复基准全景总结.md 和 zhaoganlong 训练指南），同时负责排查 BC-RNN 模型零成功率的根本原因，并规划 an49 全任务训练所需的基础设施。

item.title: 错误日志 2026-03-03
item.description: 在DCC上完成了跨Section RM-IDEAL基准测试的实现，并与方法文档进行了对接。随后在天河超级计算集群上对Pi0.5 LoRA模型进行了全面评估，结果显示其性能优于BC-RNN模型（效率提升了58.9%）。此外，我们还确认了训练权重的来源，确认所有权重都使用了pi05_base模型。最后，我们成功恢复了第9个任务的训练过程。

item.title: 缺陷记录表 2026-03-02
item.description: DCC已经完成了scGPT+UNI2全套融合实验以及周报可视化工作，并识别出STAIG在构建关键架构时并未使用gene encoder的事实。此外，我们还成功地在天河双节点上管理了9个Pi0.5 LoRA训练任务，解决了eval pipeline中的多个关键问题（如websocket超时、JIT并发崩溃）。我们进一步分析了VLA推理过程中GPU利用率仅为10%的根本原因，并设计了批量并发eval优化方案。

item.title: 缺陷记录表 2026-03-01
item.description: 在DCC和tianhe这两台服务器上，我们同时推进了四个项目：DCC完成了VisiumHD的三种注释可视化处理以及STAIG融合多模态运行（Silhouette得分0.343），并对MIHD仓库进行了六阶段的大规模清理重构（删除了约250K条代码）；tianhe则完成了Pi0.5基础模型评估（SR率为4.2%），修复了Coffee BC-RNN中对象观测键缺失的问题，开发了BC-RNN Stack_D0错误场景生成流水线（修复了四层图像生成的11个场景问题），并在修复了四个启动错误之后，成功以6×A800 GPU的100%利用率来并行微调Pi0.5 LoRA任务。

item.title: 错误日志 2026-02-28
item.description: 在DCC上完成了MIHD项目Visium HD的全链路扩展工作（修改了8个文件），并且修复了scGPT关键权重加载相关的漏洞问题（修复程度达到了44.4%）。同时在tianhe平台上，从零开始实现了BC-RNN Phoenix的基线训练流程，并成功启动了9个任务的并行训练。此外，还完成了Pi0.5 Phoenix的首次评测部署工作（完成了7/9个任务）。

item.title: bug journal 2026-02-27
item.description: On the Tianhe HPC cluster, the storage space analysis was completed, and the process of applying for GPUs on Slurm nodes was finalized. The results of the M14 baseline evaluation confirmed that Pi0/BC-RNN achieved almost zero success rates in error recovery scenarios.

item.title: 缺陷日志 2026-02-26
item.description: On the supercomputer cluster, the BC-RNN training configuration was reverted to the image mode, and a successful 5-task parallel training was initiated. Additionally, the evaluation framework was extended to support 5 MimicGen tasks. It was also identified and resolved the issue of mismatch in task distribution, which resulted in a 0% success rate for Pi0.5.

item.title: 缺陷日志 2026-02-23
item.description: 在DCC节点系统中，我们优化了MIHD空间组学融合训练过程（包括3项CPU加速措施、架构解耦设计、全切片基准测试以及Vision Refine对比实验）。同时，在天河集群上完成了MimicGen数据的准备工作，修复了M14三路评估中的环境指纹崩溃问题，并解决了Pi0.5全量微调时出现的OOM问题。最终，成功将Pi0.5 LoRA训练任务（Job 46553）推进到稳定运行状态。

item.title: 缺陷日志 2026-02-22
item.description: DCC已经完成了MIHD项目的清理整顿工作，并实现了与Vision Refinement两阶段的融合实施。目前，批量实验正在全面推进中。同时，Tianhe公司也已经全面启动了Error Recovery Benchmark Phase II的工作（包括M14评估流水线验证以及Pi0.5版本的OOM诊断），并且已经完成Phoenix pi0.5版本的完整数据流水线的搭建工作（共9个MimicGen任务的数据被存储到系统中，总容量达到18.4GB；训练配置也已经准备就绪）。

item.title: 错误日志 2026-02-20
item.description: We have conducted specialized tests on the STAIG fusion module of the MIHD project. It was discovered that there is a double-normalization issue in eval_scan_fusion.py. Additionally, a caching mechanism for embeddings at the pipeline level was introduced in run_benchmark.py.

item.title: 缺陷记录表 2026-02-19
item.description: 在 MIHD项目中，系统完成了对仅基于图像的自聚类方法的文献调研（确立了ARI基线为0.11–0.16，并分析了Foundation Model失效的五大原因）。同时，我们编写了四份核心技术文档，并实现了三种自监督聚类增强方案（STEGO/BYOL+GAT/SCAN）。通过SCAN算法，仅基于图像的ARI值从0.251提升到了0.303（+20.6%）。

item.title: 缺陷记录表 2026-02-14
item.description: We have implemented a force injection enhancement scheme for the robotic arm’s error recovery benchmark, but a force of 30N still fails to produce any visible disturbance in the video. The issue remains unresolved.

item.title: 错误日志 2026-02-13
item.description: 请将 MIHD项目增强计划文档翻译成中文，并将其写入新的文件中。同时，请保留所有与占位符相关的内容，如token、URL、文件路径以及代码标识符。

item.title: 错误日志 2026-02-12
item.description: 在 Tianhe设备上完成了对 ccusage GLM 计费功能的代码实现和调试工作；而在 DCC设备上，则完成了 MIHD 增强计划的中文版本整理工作。

item.title: 错误日志 2026-02-10
item.description: 在三个项目中全面推进：为机器人基准测试项目完善贡献者文档；整理robobrain_pi的历史记录，并为SAC强化学习训练做好准备；启动gadget research模块的文档更新工作。

item.title: 错误日志 2026-02-07
item.description: Today’s AI Dialogue Summary

item.title: bug journal 2026-02-06
item.description: Cross-DCC clusters and TzJsDesktop, the system has diagnosed and quantified the five major performance differences between MIHD staig_fusion and the original STAIG. Additionally, we have completed the engineering delivery of the histogram repair for the benchmark tool, as well as the automatic publishing pipeline via GitHub Pages, along with the CLI-based interactive upload functionality.

item.title: 缺陷日志 2025-10-02
item.description: 在 AutoSeg-SAM2 项目中打开相关的源文件，会话尚未实际开始运行。
